profiles.label: Commercial Panels / Troffers
profiles.decision_lens: Prioritize usable light output, installation path, commercial controls, and channel-ready certifications before lower-signal cosmetic asks.

profiles.label: Emergency / Exit
profiles.decision_lens: Prioritize code compliance, emergency runtime, and installation details before lumen-first optimization.

profiles.label: Bulbs / Consumer Lamps
profiles.decision_lens: Prioritize base compatibility, smart/dimming behavior, and mainstream consumer pricing before niche claims.

profiles.label: Wall Packs / Outdoor Security
profiles.decision_lens: Prioritize photocell/control behavior, cutoff and outdoor durability, and contractor-friendly wattage bands before secondary finish details.

profiles.label: Generic Lighting
profiles.decision_lens: Prioritize price position, core performance specs, and the features most often repeated across the competitor set.

modifiers.label: Direct Mount
modifiers.decision_lens_addendum: Treat surface-mount hardware completeness and install simplicity as go/no-go requirements before tuning secondary options.

static_primary_drivers.label: Surface / direct-mount installation
static_primary_drivers.reason: This variant only works if the direct-mount install path is simple, complete, and channel-ready.

modifiers.label: Grid Frame / Sensor Receptacle
modifiers.decision_lens_addendum: Treat the grid-frame package and downstream control-compatibility path as primary buying filters, not hidden accessories.

static_primary_drivers.label: Grid frame / receptacle path
static_primary_drivers.reason: The grid-frame layout and sensor-receptacle path need to be explicit enough to justify the variant.

modifiers.label: Controls / Auto-Dimming
modifiers.decision_lens_addendum: Treat occupancy and daylight controls as a core commercial-controls package, not a side accessory.

static_primary_drivers.label: Commercial control package
static_primary_drivers.reason: The controls story needs to be explicit enough to justify the added complexity and channel expectations.

modifiers.label: Emergency Backup
modifiers.decision_lens_addendum: Treat emergency runtime and code-adjacent claims as must-prove requirements, not optional premium add-ons.

static_primary_drivers.label: Emergency egress support
static_primary_drivers.reason: Emergency-backed variants need runtime and transfer behavior to be proven, not implied.

modifiers.label: High Output
modifiers.decision_lens_addendum: Validate whether the higher-output step materially improves the use case enough to justify the price and margin pressure.

static_primary_drivers.label: High-output step-up
static_primary_drivers.reason: The higher-output jump should solve a real coverage or replacement need, not just add cost.

modifiers.label: Ultra High Output
modifiers.decision_lens_addendum: Treat the ultra-output step as a strategic premium move that needs clear use-case justification and margin discipline.

static_primary_drivers.label: Ultra-output requirement
static_primary_drivers.reason: Ultra-output variants should justify the higher wattage and lumen step with a clear replacement or coverage story.

modifiers.label: Center Basket Troffer
modifiers.decision_lens_addendum: Treat the non-retrofit troffer form factor and install context as primary filters before optimizing secondary spec knobs.

static_primary_drivers.label: Center basket troffer form factor
static_primary_drivers.reason: Troffer-style buyers will filter first on fixture architecture and install fit before secondary spec upgrades.

modifiers.label: High CRI
modifiers.decision_lens_addendum: Treat the high-CRI promise as a use-case-specific quality claim that needs to earn its cost premium.

static_primary_drivers.label: High CRI requirement
static_primary_drivers.reason: High-CRI positioning should solve a real visual-quality need rather than act as a generic premium badge.
